title: Pay It No Mind: Marsha P. Johnson
original_title: Pay It No Mind: Marsha P. Johnson
overview: Marsha P. Johnson was a drag queen, sex worker, and LGBT activist who fought at Stonewall and knew Andy Warhol.  She was a New York fixture who made her motto her middle name: "Pay it no mind". This documentary about her life includes the last interview she gave before the suspicious circumstances of her death in 1992.
